nl_query: List all faculty members who prepared the answer key for the Algorithms exam and whether they are also in the evaluator pool for that course.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, akp.employee_id AS preparer_employee_id, ep.is_available AS is_in_evaluator_pool
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   answer_key ak ON ak.id = akp.answer_key_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
JOIN   board b ON b.qp_id = ak.qp_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = b.course_id
JOIN   evaluator_pool ep ON ep.faculty_cache_id = fc.id AND ep.board_id = b.id
WHERE  au.name = 'Algorithms' AND akp.employee_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER  BY fc.name, ep.is_available;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_key_preparer.employee_id, answer_key_preparer.employee_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
